autorizaciones.title: Authorisations
autorizaciones.admin_intro: Create, publish and sign authorisations (outing, house rules…). The legal text is set by the centre.
autorizaciones.family_intro: Read and sign your children's outing authorisations.
autorizaciones.aviso_legal: Simple electronic signature with an evidentiary record (name, stroke, text hash, date, IP). Its legal validity is pending legal review.

lista.vacia_familia: You have no pending or signed authorisations.

form.texto_placeholder: Paste the real legal text here (or a test one).
form.texto_legal_aviso: This is the text that gets signed and hashed: only change it before any signatures exist.
form.texto_definitivo: Mark text as final (required to publish and sign)

firma.pad_ayuda: Draw your signature with your finger or mouse
firma.no_firmable: This authorisation is not available to sign.
firma.ya_firmado: You have already signed this authorisation.
firma.confirmo: I have read the text and expressly authorise what it states.
firma.nombre_ayuda: It must match the name on your profile.
firma.revocar_contactar: To cancel a signature already made, contact the centre.
firma.revocar_aviso: Revoking will alert the management and the class teachers.

roster.sin_ninos: No children fall under this authorisation.

detalle.texto_no_definitivo: The text is not marked as final yet: it cannot be published or signed.
detalle.es_plantilla: Catalog format: it is not signed; it is sent to an audience (or started by the family).

errors.evento_no_encontrado: The event doesn't exist or isn't accessible.
errors.texto_bloqueado_firmas: The text can't be changed: signatures already exist.
errors.texto_no_definitivo: Mark the text as final before publishing.
errors.no_firmable: This authorisation can't be signed right now.
errors.no_es_tutor: Your guardian link to this child isn't on record.
errors.nombre_no_coincide: The typed name doesn't match your profile.
errors.nino_no_encontrado: The child doesn't exist or isn't accessible.
errors.plantilla_duplicada: An active format of that type already exists. Void the previous one to create another.
errors.envio_fallo: The authorization could not be sent.
errors.plantilla_no_encontrada: The format does not exist or is not accessible.
errors.plantilla_no_publicada: The format is not published or not final.
errors.tipo_no_enviable: This type is started by the family; it is not sent.
errors.personas_requeridas: List at least one authorised person to sign.
errors.recogida_sin_plantilla: The center has not published the pick-up format yet.
errors.medicacion_sin_plantilla: The center has not published the medication format yet.
errors.med_fuera_de_vigencia: Today must be within the medication dates to sign.
errors.med_caducada: You cannot authorise a medication whose end date has already passed.
errors.adm_registro_fallo: The administration could not be logged.
errors.adm_no_medicacion: This authorisation is not a medication.
errors.adm_no_permitido: You can't log this administration (the medication must be signed and valid today).
errors.adm_confirmar_fallo: The administration could not be confirmed.
errors.adm_confirmar_no_permitido: You can't confirm this administration (it must be confirmed by a staff member other than the one who administered it).
errors.revocar_no_permitido: You can only revoke pick-up and medication.
errors.archivar_no_permitido: You do not have permission to archive this medication.

catalogo.descripcion: The center's standard formats. Edit the text, mark it final and publish it.
catalogo.intro: Create the standard format for a type. Then write its text and publish it.
catalogo.vacio: No formats in the catalog yet.

instancias.descripcion: Sent or trip authorizations that families can sign.

enviar.intro: Take a published format and send it to an audience.
enviar.sin_plantillas: There are no published formats to send. Create one first.

recogida.dni_aviso: The document is stored as text; the photo will be added later.
recogida.intro: List who can pick up your child and sign. The regular list stays open; the one-off is valid only today.
recogida.rgpd_terceros: You are providing third-party data (name and ID of whoever picks up). The center processes it to verify pick-up; inform those people that their data is shared with the center.

medicacion.intro: Enter the medication, dose and schedule for your child and sign. The dates set the validity.
medicacion.vigencia_ayuda: The dates set the validity of the authorisation. Today must be within the range to sign.
medicacion.aviso: Health data of a minor. The center processes it to administer the medication per your authorisation. The report/prescription can be attached later.

administracion.intro: Record that you have administered this medication. It will stay pending until a second staff member confirms it.
administracion.aviso_doble: Double confirmation: a different staff member must confirm this administration.
administracion.espera_segundo: Waiting for a second staff member to confirm.

sin_acceso.descripcion: You can't view this authorisation. If you think this is a mistake, contact the centre.

excursion.intro: A field-trip authorisation hangs off a calendar event. Choose the trip.
excursion.sin_eventos: There are no field trips in the calendar. Create the trip (the event) first, then come back here for its authorisation.
excursion.crear_evento: Create field trip in the calendar
excursion.crear_otra: Not listed? Create a field trip in the calendar
excursion.texto_placeholder: Text families will sign (I authorise the trip…)

tipos_area.descripcion: The centre manages these 5 types. Four are catalogue formats; the field trip hangs off an event.
tipos_area.reglas_regimen_interno: Catalogue format. Sent to families to sign.
tipos_area.autorizacion_imagenes: Catalogue format. Image consent (signing in F11).
tipos_area.recogida: The family states who picks up the child and signs.
tipos_area.medicacion: The family authorises a medication with its schedule and signs.
tipos_area.salida: Field trip: hangs off a calendar event; no catalogue.

teacher.intro: Pick-ups and medication for the children in your classroom. Open one to record and confirm a medication administration.
teacher.recogidas_desc: Who may collect each child in your classroom (signed by the family).
teacher.recogidas_vacio: No pick-ups in your classroom yet.
teacher.medicacion_desc: Signed schedules. Open one to record or confirm an administration.
teacher.medicacion_vacio: No medication in your classroom yet.

seguimiento.pendientes_desc: What was sent and not all families have signed yet, with the specific child.
seguimiento.pendientes_vacio: Everything sent is signed. Nothing pending.
seguimiento.ultimas_desc: The 10 most recently sent or started authorizations.
seguimiento.ultimas_vacio: You have not sent any authorization yet.

medicacion_lista.pendientes_confirmar: {n, plural, one {# pending confirmation} other {# pending confirmation}}
